hero.headline: Move freight with clarity, speed, and trust
hero.subheadline: FreightFlow connects shippers and carriers on one secure marketplace built for modern logistics.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter your email and password to access your account

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Join FreightFlow to manage your logistics
register.successDescription: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please verify your account to unlock all features.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successDescription: If an account exists for that email address, we've sent a password reset link. It expires in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.resendPrompt: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or

resetPassword.invalidDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has already been used.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong password for your FreightFlow account.
